text:
Tobias Hoellrich wrote:

Hi Tobias,

Can you please issue a boot verbose during startup, and possibly even 
upgrade to 8-CURRENT (which has debugging support included in the OS)
so that we might be able to determine what is going on?

Thanks
remko
